item.title: sagantos24: Bobby Manzi reposteó 鎌田 大地 @sagantos24 · 59min I don’t know who but just congratulation. Cita Football Away Days @FBAway
item.description:
Bobby Manzi reposteó 鎌田 大地 @sagantos24 · 59min I don’t know who but just congratulation. Cita Football Away Days @FBAwayDays · 3h Imagine getting married in Florence and Crystal Palace fans swarm you chanting about Daichi Kamada…
Seems to be a good laugh though, the groom was loving it!! 22 315 2 mil 226 mil

item.title:
MiguelDelaney: Miguel Delaney reposteó Miguel Delaney @MiguelDelaney · 21h Episode 4 of our 'Copa Independent' podcast
On USA 94, and
item.description:
Miguel Delaney reposteó Miguel Delaney @MiguelDelaney · 21h Episode 4 of our 'Copa Independent' podcast
On USA 94, and how 2026 is impossible without its spectacular success
That was because of unique factors that came together, but also changed football for now
Ticket prices/Glazers don't happen without it youtube.com Miguel Delaney's Inside Football 2 likes, 2 comments. "Born in the USA - the great American World Cup" 1 15 52 mil

item.title: indykaila: indykaila News @indykaila · 4min You could say this is Manchester United's biggest game since the Europa League final la
item.description:
indykaila News @indykaila · 4min You could say this is Manchester United's biggest game since the Europa League final last season.
A win will almost guarantee Champions League football next season. Colaboración pagada 18 5 49 4 mil

item.title:
FPL_Harry: Harry @FPL_Harry · 6h As time has gone on I do think there is a good chance Welbeck plays both in the double.
TOT (a) +
item.description:
Harry @FPL_Harry · 6h As time has gone on I do think there is a good chance Welbeck plays both in the double.
TOT (a) + CHE (H) are two huge games for the race to European or even champions league football.
They won’t want to be without him. #FPL Plus a 10 day rest after to GW35! Cita Hatch @Hatchtheyid · 7h En respuesta a @FPL_Harry Welbeck both?? 16 2 175 89 mil
